creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: Inconsistency between ONLY_FOR_ARCHS and ONLY_FOR_ARCHS_REASON is still there. Also, there's no clarification which `dependency' is implied here. It seems to not build because of type mismatch, so it should be marked BROKEN instead. Though, of course, it should better be fixed instead. Attached is simple patch which fixes the build. It may need some testing though.
